name: Pumpkin Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon baking soda, dissolved in 1 teaspoon milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pumpkin, sugar, oil, and egg.
2. Stir together with flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt.
3. Add the dissolved baking soda mixture and vanilla to the mixture.
4. Add the chocolate chips.
5. Grease a cookie sheet.
6. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto the prepared cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
